name: agent-skills-marketplace
description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills and plugins for developers

plugins.name: daily-carry
plugins.description: Essential daily-use skills: Portainer deployment management and Tech Research Enforcer for verified coding answers

plugins.name: release-automation
plugins.description: Automated release workflow for any project type with version bumping, changelog generation, documentation sync, and git operations. Supports Node.js, Python, Rust, Go, Java, generic projects, monorepos, and Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: diataxis
plugins.description: Documentation writing and review skills based on the Diátaxis framework. Seven skills covering all four documentation quadrants (tutorial, how-to, reference, explanation), plus README landing pages, a doc planner, and a docs reviewer.

plugins.name: sdlc-workflow
plugins.description: Complete SDLC workflow as four skill-mode routers plus the wf-design router and a setup-wide-logging command. /wf executes the canonical 13-stage lifecycle (shape, slice, plan, implement, verify, review, handoff, ship, retro) plus four perf/observability augmentations. /wf-quick starts compressed flows (9 sub-commands; v9.10.0 replaces v9.9.0's `--slug` flag with no-flag positional slug detection — if the first argument after the sub-command matches a non-closed slug in the new `.ai/workflows/INDEX.md` registry, the sub-command attaches as a compressed slice on that workflow). /wf-meta sync owns the registry — bootstrap on first run, refresh on every run. /wf-meta navigates and manages existing workflows (10 sub-commands). /wf-design dispatches across 22 design sub-commands. /review runs per-dimension or named-sweep code review across 31 dimensions and 7 sweeps via parallel sub-agent dispatch. wf-validate pre-write hook gates artifact writes and now warns (non-blocking) on INDEX.md drift. Workflow-type aware (compressed, forwarded, standard). Per-slice review artifacts. Augmentations register on the workflow index and produce type-specific deliverables that downstream stages consume. v9.0.0 lands the four-router architecture; full release notes in plugins/sdlc-workflow/CHANGELOG.md.
